settings.heading: Built for your mission
settings.description: Whether you're building strength, cutting fat, or grinding through endurance training — there's a stack for that.

settings.heading: Born in recovery. Built for performance.
settings.content_text: Blackout was built by someone who knows what it means to fight to get back. After four spinal surgeries and a military career, the founder came back through training. He couldn't find a supplement brand that matched his standards — so he built one. US-made, clinically dosed, full disclosure on every label.

settings.heading: US-made ingredients
settings.text: Every product sourced and manufactured in the United States. No overseas fillers, no quality shortcuts.

settings.heading: Full label disclosure
settings.text: Every ingredient at its full clinical dose. No proprietary blends. No underdosed formulas hiding behind a label.

settings.heading: 60-day money-back
settings.text: If it doesn't deliver, you don't pay. Try Blackout for 60 days and get a full refund if you're not satisfied.

settings.heading: Nothing without a reason
settings.text: Every ingredient earns its place. No fillers, no fluff — just what your body needs to perform.

settings.content_heading: Lock in your stack and save.
settings.content_text: Subscribe and save on your monthly supply. Never run out. No contract, cancel any time. Stacking multiple products? Bundle pricing drops the cost even further.

settings.heading: Ready to train without excuses?
settings.description: US-made supplements built for people who don't cut corners. Start your stack today.

settings.tagline: Sourced and made in the USA
settings.heading: No overseas shortcuts
settings.text: Every product in the Blackout lineup is sourced and manufactured in the United States. We won't compromise where your fuel comes from.

settings.heading: Doses that do the job
settings.text: Every ingredient is at the dose the research supports. No pixie-dusting. No hiding underdosed ingredients inside a 'proprietary blend.' You get what the label says.

settings.heading: Nothing hidden, nothing extra
settings.text: Every ingredient is listed. Every dose is shown. We don't believe in hiding behind blends. If it's in there, you can see it. If it doesn't serve a purpose, it's not in there.

settings.heading: Try it. If it doesn't deliver, we refund it.
settings.text: We stand behind every product we make. Order Blackout, use it for 60 days. If you don't see what you came for, we'll refund you in full. No hoops, no questions.
